hero.badge: Open Beta · Play Now For Free
hero.sub: A fast-paced multiplayer card game where strategy, timing and rare collectibles decide who rules the table.

items.title: Real-Time Multiplayer Duels
items.description: Face opponents live in turn-based battles. Play cards, form sets, and be the first to empty your hand before the time runs out.

items.title: Outsmart Your Opponents
items.description: Every game is different. Manage your hand, block your rivals from going out, and use JOKER cards to turn the tide at the last second.

items.title: Ranked Seasons & Tournaments
items.description: Climb the global MMR ladder, unlock exclusive seasonal rewards, and compete in head-to-head tournaments for rare prizes.

items.title: Rare Card Sleeves & Pets
items.description: Stand out at the table with Legendary card sleeves, animated pets, glowing profile frames and exclusive avatar art.

items.title: Private Rooms & Friends
items.description: Create private lobbies, invite friends and rematch rivals. 2-player and 4-player modes for fast or intense sessions.

items.title: Battle Pass & Daily XP
items.description: Earn XP every match, level up your Battle Pass and unlock exclusive rewards just by playing every day.

cta.sub: Join thousands of players already competing. Create your account in seconds — no download required.

footer.desc: The next generation of competitive card gaming. Built on neural networks, designed for the future of digital combat.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Moove Gaming Systems. All rights reserved.

play.title: Enter the Arena
play.rankedDesc: Compete for global ranking points. Winning increases your MMR.
play.casualLobbyDesc: Join or create custom lobbies safely without risking your rank.
play.vsAiDesc2: Train your strategies against adaptive neural network bots.
play.beFirstCreate: Be the first — create a room!
play.ascendRanksDesc: Every match impacts your MMR rating. Face off against players of similar skill — only opponents within ±1 rank of yours.
play.neuralTestingDesc: Simulate combat scenarios against our adaptive learning algorithms. The AI adjusts its difficulty based on your performance. No ranking points awarded or lost.

onboarding.s0_sub: A strategic card game for 2–4 players
onboarding.s0_p1: The objective is simple: empty your hand before the other players.
onboarding.s0_p2: The deck has numbered cards from 1 to 13 in 4 colors — red, blue, green and yellow — plus Jokers (Wildcards).
onboarding.s0_note: Each number exists in all 4 colors + 2 jokers
onboarding.s1_p1: A Set consists of 3 or 4 cards with the same number, each in a different color.
onboarding.s1_valid: ✓ Valid Set — three 8s in different colors
onboarding.s2_p1: A Run consists of 3 or more consecutive cards of the same color.
onboarding.s3_p1: Once a group is on the table, it belongs to the grid and any player can use it.
onboarding.s3_p2: On your turn, you can take cards from groups already on the table, combine them with your hand cards, and form new groups.
onboarding.s3_warn: ⚠️ Crucial rule: at the end of your turn, ALL cards on the table must be in valid groups of 3+. If you can't manage it, you draw 3 cards as a penalty.
onboarding.s3_joker: The Joker can replace any card in any group!
onboarding.s4_sub: How to win and climb the ranks
onboarding.s4_p1: You win when you completely empty your hand. If the deck runs out, the player with the lowest total card value wins.
onboarding.s4_p2: ⚠️ Joker in hand at the end = 20 penalty points.
onboarding.s5_p1: The Multi Plays button lets you select cards from multiple table groups and your hand at the same time, reorganizing them into new valid groups with a single click.
onboarding.s5_step1: Click the Multi Plays button during your turn
onboarding.s5_step2: Click on table cards you want to take (they go to the staging area)
onboarding.s5_step3: Click on your hand cards to add them too
onboarding.s5_step4: Click Confirm — the system automatically forms valid groups
onboarding.s5_tip: ⚠️ You must include at least 1 card from your hand and the final result must form valid groups. If not, you can cancel without penalty.
onboarding.s6_tip1: Start with a vs AI match to practice without pressure
onboarding.s6_tip2: Watch the table cards — you can reorganize them in your favor
onboarding.s6_tip3: Jokers are powerful, but careful: worth 20 penalty points if left in hand
onboarding.s6_tip4: Try to empty your hand in few turns to maximize XP
onboarding.s6_tip5: Check the full Rules at any time from the menu
